title: Marketing project needs real growth execution
summary: Operator correction that Marketing & Growth cannot just hold positioning work. It needs posts, DMs, launch prep, demos, reply classification, and follow-up issues.

messages.body: mkt 里为什么都没有推进 Octopus 增长的真实 issue? 要有发推文、运营推广、具体计划和落实。
同意。Marketing 项目应该从真实增长动作开始：X launch thread、HN packet、founder DM、demo clip、community posts、reply classifier 和 weekly report。我会把这些转成可执行 issue。

title: Calendar should emerge from real work history
summary: Operator rejects Calendar-only fixture thinking and clarifies that Calendar should reveal a month of daily agent runs in the Octopus Studio org.

messages.body: 不要专门给 Calendar 构建场景。真实用户场景里 Agent 每天运行一个月，Calendar 自然应该能看到运行数据。
我会把 Calendar 当成 run history 的视图，核心数据放在 issues、heartbeat runs、costs、approvals 和活动里，Calendar 只派生显示这些信号。

title: Budget overage follow-up
summary: Operator asks whether growth and release work should keep running after Octopus Studio crosses the monthly budget.

messages.body: Octopus Studio monthly spend has exceeded the configured budget.
I opened a budget override approval with options to pause growth experiments, approve a one-week override, or resume only release reliability.
